tickets.name: WO-2481 — Replace compressor bearing
tickets.text:
WO-2481: Replace compressor bearing — Line 3
Priority High | Department Facilities | Status Open
Assignee R. Vasquez
Due 2026-07-18
Parts
Bearing 6205-2RS. qty 2 @ 14.50
Synthetic grease NLGI-2. qty 1 @ 22.00
Steps
Lockout. Isolate breaker P3-11 and verify zero energy at the panel.
Teardown. Pull the guard, belt, and pulley; extract the worn bearing.
Rebuild. Press the new bearing, torque to 24 Nm, re-tension the belt.
Verify. Run 10 minutes; vibration must read under 2.8 mm/s.

tickets.name: WO-2492 — Quarterly UPS battery swap
tickets.text:
WO-2492: Quarterly UPS battery swap — Server room B
Priority Medium | Department IT | Status Open
Assignee T. Okafor
Due 2026-07-25
Parts
APC RBC55 battery cartridge. qty 2 @ 189.00
Nitrile gloves box. qty 1 @ 9.75
Steps
Bypass. Put UPS-B2 into maintenance bypass and confirm load transfer.
Swap. Replace both cartridges; check terminals for corrosion.
Runtime test. Pull mains for 5 minutes; log runtime and alarms.

tickets.name: WO-2503 — Forklift 7 hydraulic leak
tickets.text:
WO-2503: Forklift 7 hydraulic leak — Dock 2
Priority Critical | Department Fleet | Status In Progress
Assignee M. Deng
Due 2026-07-10
Parts
Hydraulic hose 3/8 R2AT. qty 1 @ 31.20
ISO 46 hydraulic fluid 5L. qty 2 @ 42.00
Steps
Contain. Drip tray under the mast; absorbent socks around the dock plate.
Replace. Swap the split hose at the lift cylinder; torque fittings to spec.
Bleed and test. Cycle the mast 10 times; verify no weep at full extension.
